scripts.build: tsc && npm run build:settings && npm run build:widgets && npm run sanitize:homey-build
scripts.start: npm run build:settings && npm run build:widgets && homey app run --remote
scripts.install-app: npm run build:settings && npm run build:widgets && homey app install
scripts.arch:check: dependency-cruiser --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs app.ts flowCards drivers lib packages/settings-ui/src packages/contracts/src packages/shared-domain/src
scripts.test:unit: vitest run --config vitest.config.fast.ts && vitest run --config vitest.config.dom.fast.ts
scripts.test:unit:ci: vitest run --config vitest.config.ts && vitest run --config vitest.config.dom.ts
scripts.ci:checks: npm run build && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:html && npm run lint:runtime && npm run arch:check && npm run deadcode:check && npm run typecheck:unused && npm run lint
scripts.ci:test:runtime: npm run test:unit:ci && npm run test:unit:tz
scripts.ci:test:playwright:quick: npm --workspace @pels/settings-ui run build && CI=1 PELS_E2E_BUILD=0 npm --workspace @pels/settings-ui run test:e2e -- --project=chromium-mobile-width
scripts.ci:test:playwright: npm --workspace @pels/settings-ui run build && CI=1 PELS_E2E_BUILD=0 npm --workspace @pels/settings-ui run test:e2e -- --project=chromium-mobile-width --project=firefox-mobile-width
scripts.ci: npm run ci:checks && npm run ci:test:runtime && npm run ci:test:settings-ui
scripts.ci:full: npm run ci && npm run ci:test:playwright
scripts.validate: homey app validate && npm run package:check
scripts.start:local: npm run build:settings && npm run build:widgets && homey app run
